channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-21 20:48 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Walter Isaacson explains exactly how Elon Musk uses first principles thinking to build rockets: When...
item.description: Walter Isaacson explains exactly how Elon Musk uses first principles thinking to build rockets: When young Elon wanted to send people to space, he first tried buying used rockets from Russia. They jacked him around - it didn’t work So he went back to first principles. He asked: Exactly how much does each material in a rocket cost? How much is the Inconel? How much is the carbon fiber? How much is the fuel? What’s the total cost of the raw materials compared to the price of a finished rocket? That’s first principles He realized: if he could cut manufacturing costs by a factor of 10, he could actually build affordable rockets Same mindset at Tesla: someone says “we need this patch of felt at the bottom of the car” and Elon replies, “Tell me the principles of physics that make that true” Isaacson notes: America used to be a nation of risk-takers. Now we have more referees, guardrails, and lawyers saying “that’s probably not a good idea” than people willing to shoot off a rocket Elon wants to calculate the risk and then actually take it This is why SpaceX exists. This is how impossible things get done

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok can help with your taxes. Keep your sanity intact. Spot missed deductions. Question the numbers...
item.description: Grok can help with your taxes. Keep your sanity intact. Spot missed deductions. Question the numbers. Grok doesn’t get tired of receipts. Refund energy activated.@grok

item.title: @elonmusk: I used to say, "Google it!" Now I say, "Grok it!"
item.description: I used to say, "Google it!" Now I say, "Grok it!"

item.title: @elonmusk: These chibi Elon figures are dangerously cute 😭💙 Big sparkling eyes, fluffy hair, tiny blue jacket, ...
item.description: These chibi Elon figures are dangerously cute 😭💙 Big sparkling eyes, fluffy hair, tiny blue jacket, mic in hand, and that American flag backdrop… I’m melting. Make Life Multiplanetary just became 1000× more adorable 🚀🇺🇸🥹

item.title: @elonmusk: The Human Rights Campaign! Sounds great. I support human rights. But@robbystarbucksays the HRC “has ...
item.description: The Human Rights Campaign! Sounds great. I support human rights. But@robbystarbucksays the HRC “has nothing to do with actual human rights.” They push "transgenderism into the workplace and support sex changes for kids.” And big companies subscribe:

item.title: @elonmusk: This isn’t China. This is California. Tesla built the world’s largest Supercharger station in Lost H...
item.description: This isn’t China. This is California. Tesla built the world’s largest Supercharger station in Lost Hills, CA, called “Oasis.” The site features 11 MW of solar capacity. Energy is stored in 10 Tesla Megapacks, providing 39 MWh of battery storage to power 164 stalls.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla’s TeraFab officially begins TODAY 🏭 This is make or break for possibly the whole AI industry E...
item.description: Tesla’s TeraFab officially begins TODAY 🏭 This is make or break for possibly the whole AI industry Elon’s trying to build a 2nm chip fab from scratch. The most advanced process node on Earth. Only 3 companies can do this. TSMC spent $165 billion on their Arizona cluster alone. It took decades of institutional knowledge. Tesla has manufactured zero semiconductors. Ever. But they don’t really have a choice choice: Even in the best-case scenario where TSMC, Samsung, and Micron all max out production for Tesla, it’s still not enough chips for the Optimus and Cybercab roadmap…let alone the rest of the industry The AI5 chip this fab is designed to produce has 50x the compute of AI4. They need 100-200 billion of them per year. No foundry on the planet can commit to that volume on Tesla’s timeline. If it works, Tesla becomes one of maybe 4 entities on Earth that can produce frontier AI silicon in-house, and the only one that also builds the robots and cars. It would be game over

item.title: @elonmusk: China builds the way the U.S. did before we got in our own way. We need to stop getting in our own w...
item.description: China builds the way the U.S. did before we got in our own way. We need to stop getting in our own way.

item.title: @elonmusk: Optimus+PV will be the first Von Neumann probe, a machine fully capable of replicating itself using ...
item.description: Optimus+PV will be the first Von Neumann probe, a machine fully capable of replicating itself using raw materials found in space
